subcodes.first_line: Say: How sweet is the Kawthar of steadfastness when quaffed from the hand of the Friend, and how excellent is its fragrance when inhaled therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو چه خوشست کوثر استقامت اگر از دست دوست بیاشامید و چه نیکوست عرف آن اگر بان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
